title.ko: 태양열 집열기; 태양열 시스템 (태양열로부터 기계적인 힘을 생산하기위한 것 F03G 6/00)
title.en: SOLAR HEAT COLLECTORS; SOLAR HEAT SYSTEMS (for producing mechanical power from solar energy F03G0006000000)

definition.ko: 이 서브클래스에서, 다음 용어 또는 표현은 표시된 의미로 사용됩니다. · 종종 "모듈"이라고 불리는 "태양 집열기 모듈"은 다음을 포함합니다 : b. 전체 태양 집열기; c. 태양 집열기 요소, 예. 반사경, 렌즈 또는 축열 요소; · "흡수 요소“는 태양 광선을 흡수하는 요소와 그것을 열로 전환하는 요소를 포함합니다. · "태양열 시스템"은 태양 집열기를 구성 요소로 하고, 수집된 열을 사용하는 시스템을 포함합니다.

title.ko: 작동 유체를 사용하는 태양열 집열기
title.en: Solar heat collectors using working fluids
the working fluids forming pools or ponds
Salt-gradient ponds
using covers or floating solar absorbing elements

title.ko: 2 개 이상의 작동 유체를 사용하는 회로를 갖는 것 (2 개 이상의 유체 사이에서 열교환하는 수단을 가지는 것 F24S 10/30)
title.en: having circuits for two or more working fluids (with means for exchanging heat between two or more fluids F24S0010300000)
having two or more passages for the same working fluid layered in the direction of solar rays, e.g. having upper circulation channels connected with lower circulation channels
with means for exchanging heat between two or more working fluids
in absorbing elements surrounded by transparent enclosures, e.g. evacuated solar heat collectors

title.ko: 작동 유체가 판사이로 유도된 것
title.en: the working fluids being conveyed between plates

title.ko: 확대된 표면이 있는 것, 예. 돌출부 또는 주름이 있는 것 (작동유체와 직접 접촉하는 다공성 물질 또는 투과성 물질을 포함하는 집열체 F24S 10/80)
title.en: with enlarged surfaces, e.g. with protrusions or corrugations  (collectors comprising porous materials or permeable masses directly contacting the working fluids F24S0010800000)
the working fluids trickling freely over absorbing elements

title.ko: 작동 유체가 관형 흡수 도관으로 유되는 것
title.en: the working fluids being conveyed through tubular absorbing conduits

title.ko: 확대된 표면이 있는 것, 예. 돌출부 또는 주름이 있는 것 (작동유체와 직접 접촉하는 다공성 물질 또는 투과성 물질을 포함하는 집열체 F24S 10/80)
title.en: with enlarged surfaces, e.g. with protrusions or corrugations (collectors comprising porous material or permeable masses directly contacting the working fluids F24S0010800000)

title.ko: 작동 유체와 직접 접촉하는 다공성 물질 또는 투과성 물질을 포함하는 것 (모세관 효과에 의해서, 액화된 작동 유체를 증발기 섹션으로부터 응축기 섹션으로 운반하기 위한 것 F24S 10/95)
title.en: comprising porous material or permeable masses directly contacting the working fluids  (for conveying liquefied working fluid from evaporator sections to condenser sections with capillary force F24S0010950000)
using internal thermosiphonic circulation
having evaporator sections and condenser sections, e.g. heat pipes

title.ko: 특정 용도 또는 환경에 특히 적합한 태양열 집열기
title.en: Solar heat collectors specially adapted for particular uses or environments
Solar heat collectors for receiving concentrated solar energy, e.g. receivers for solar power plants
using direct solar radiation in combination with concentrated radiation
Solar heat collectors for heating objects, e.g. solar cookers or solar furnaces
Solar heat collectors combined with other heat sources, e.g. using electrical heating or heat from ambient air
Rollable or foldable solar heat collector modules
made of flexible materials

title.ko: 고정 구조물(fixed constructions)에 결합된 태양열 집열기, 예. 건물 안에
title.en: Solar heat collectors integrated in fixed constructions, e.g. in buildings
Passive solar heat collectors, e.g. operated without external energy sources
in the form of fences, balustrades or handrails
in the form of windows
in the form of floor constructions, grounds or roads

title.ko: 외관 구조물의 형태인 것, 예. 벽 구조 (지붕널 또는 타일의 형태인 것 F24S 20/69)
title.en: in the form of facade constructions, e.g. wall constructions (in the form of shingles or tiles F24S0020690000)

title.ko: 지붕 구조물 형태인 것 (지붕널 또는 타일 형태인 것 F24S 20/69)
title.en: in the form of roof constructions (in the form of shingles or tiles F24S0020690000)
in the form of shingles or tiles

title.ko: 수인성 태양열 집열 모듈 (풀 또는 연못을 형성하는 작동 유체용 F24S 10/10)
title.en: Waterborne solar heat collector modules  (for working fluids forming pools or ponds F24S0010100000)
Airborne solar heat collector modules, e.g. inflatable structures

title.ko: F24S 10 / 00-F24S 20/00에 포함되지 않는 태양열 집열기
title.en: Solar heat collectors not provided for in groups F24S0010000000-F24S0020000000

title.ko: 태양열 집열기를위한 태양 광선 집광 장치
title.en: Arrangements for concentrating solar rays for solar heat collectors
with lenses

title.ko: 반사경을 포함하는 것
title.en: with reflectors

title.ko: 포물선 모양의 반사면(parabolic reflective surfaces)을 포함하는 것 (원통형-포물면 반사면이 있는 것 F24S 3/74)
title.en: with parabolic reflective surfaces (with cylindro-parabolic reflective surfaces F24S0023740000)
with hemispherical reflective surfaces
with trough-shaped or cylindro-parabolic reflective surfaces
with conical reflective surfaces
with flat reflective plates
with spaced and opposed interacting reflective surfaces

title.ko: 태양열 수집 모듈을 위한, 고정식 마운팅 또는 지지대의 배열
title.en: Arrangement of stationary mountings or supports for solar heat collector modules

definition.ko: 광전지 모듈과 함께 사용하기 위한 장치도 서브클래스 H02S의 관련 그룹에도 분류해야 합니다.

title.ko: 지지면으로부터 멀어지는 방향으로 연장된 것
title.en: extending in directions away from a supporting surface
using shaped bodies, e.g. concrete elements, foamed elements or moulded box-like elements
using posts in combination with upper profiles

title.ko: 프로파일의 배치, 예. 트러스 (F24S 25/12 우선)
title.en: Profile arrangements, e.g. trusses (F24S0025120000 takes precedence)
using bent plates; using assemblies of plates
Arrangement of interconnected standing structures; Standing structures having separate supporting portions for adjacent modules
Peripheral frames for modules

title.ko: 장착면을 따라 실질적으로 연장되는긴 강성 장착 요소를 사용는 것, 예. 태양열 집열기로써 건물을 덮기위한 것 (지지면으로부터 멀어지는 방향으로 연장된 것 F24S 25/10; 모듈 주변의 프레임 F24S 25/20)
title.en: using elongate rigid mounting elements extending substantially along the mounting surface, e.g. for covering buildings with solar heat collectors (extending in directions away from the supporting surface F24S0025100000;peripheral frames for modules F24S0025200000)
forming substantially planar assemblies, e.g. of coplanar or stacked profiles
by means of profiles with a cross-section defining separate supporting portions for adjacent modules
forming coplanar grids comprising longitudinal and transversal profiles

title.ko: 플레이트형 장착 요소를 사용는 것, 예. 프로파일 또는 골판; 플레이트형 모듈 프레임 (지지 표면으로부터 멀어지는 방향으로 연장된 것 F24S 25/10)
title.en: using plate-like mounting elements, e.g. profiled or corrugated plates; Plate-like module frames  (extending in directions away from a supporting surface F24S0025100000)
comprising elongate non-rigid elements, e.g. straps, wires or ropes

title.ko: 고정 수단, 예. 태양열 집열기 모듈을지지하도록 특별히 고안된 잠금 장치
title.en: Fixation means, e.g. fasteners, specially adapted for supporting solar heat collector modules
for fixing to the ground or to building structures
in the form of bent strips or assemblies of strips; Hook-like connectors; Connectors to be mounted between building-covering elements
for fixing to protruding parts of buildings, e.g. to corrugations or to standing seams
Elements driven into the ground, e.g. anchor-piles; Foundations for supporting elements; Connectors for connecting supporting structures to the ground or to flat horizontal surfaces
for fixing modules or their peripheral frames to supporting elements
Side connectors; Base connectors
Clamps; Clips
clamping by screw-threaded elements
for coupling adjacent supporting elements, e.g. for connecting profiles together

title.ko: 인접 모듈 또는 그 주변 프레임을 결합하기 위한 것 (모듈 또는 그 주변 프레임을 지지체에 고정하기 위한 것 F24S 25/63)
title.en: for coupling adjacent modules or their peripheral frames (for fixing modules or their peripheral frames to supporting elements F24S0025630000)
with means for adjusting the final position or orientation of supporting elements in relation to each other or to a mounting surface; with means for compensating mounting tolerances
Arrangements for moving or orienting solar heat collector modules
for linear movement
for rotary movement
with only one rotation axis
Vertical axis
Horizontal axis
with inclined axis
with two rotation axes
with vertical primary axis
with horizontal primary axis
with inclined primary axis
with three or more rotation axes or with multiple degrees of freedom

title.ko: 태양열 집열기의 안전 또는 보호 장치; 태양열 집열기의 오작동 방지 (제어 장치 F24S 50/00)
title.en: Safety or protection arrangements of solar heat collectors; Preventing malfunction of solar heat collectors (control arrangements  F24S0050000000)

title.ko: 보호 커버 또는 슈라우드; 폐쇄 부재, 예. 뚜껑 (투명한 외피 F24S 80/50)
title.en: Protective covers or shrouds; Closure members, e.g. lids  (transparent coverings F24S0080500000)
Cleaning; Removing snow

title.ko: 부식 방지; 오염이나 오염으로부터 보호
title.en: Preventing corrosion; Protecting against dirt or contamination

title.ko: 태양 전지 모듈 내부에서의 응축 방지 (배출에 의한 것 F24S 40/53)
title.en: Preventing condensation inside solar modules (by venting F24S0040530000)
Draining rainwater or condensation
Maintaining vacuum, e.g. by using getters
Deaerating or degassing the working fluid

title.ko: 과열 또는 과압 방지 (작동유의 배출에 의한 것 F20S 40/60)
title.en: Preventing overheating or overpressure (by draining the working fluid F24S0040600000)
by modifying the heat collection, e.g. by defocusing or by changing the position of heat-receiving elements
by venting solar heat collector enclosures

title.ko: 냉각을 위한 장치, 예. 외부 열 방출 수단 또는 내부 냉각 회로 (배출에 의한 것 F24S 40/53)
title.en: Arrangements for cooling, e.g. by using  external heat dissipating means or internal cooling circuits (by venting F24S0040530000)

title.ko: 태양열 집열기 인클로저의 과압 방지 (배출에 의한 것 F24S 40/53)
title.en: Preventing overpressure in solar heat collector enclosures (by venting F24S0040530000)
Preventing overpressure in working fluid circuits
Arrangements for draining the working fluid

title.ko: 동결 방지 (작동 유체 배출 장치 F24S 40/60)
title.en: Preventing freezing (arrangements for draining the working fluid F24S0040600000)
Accommodating differential expansion of solar heat collector elements
Arrangements for testing solar heat collectors
Arrangements for controlling solar heat collectors
for tracking
responsive to temperature
responsive to wind
for controlling collection or absorption of solar radiation

title.ko: 태양열 집열기에 의해 수집된 열을 저장하기위한 장치 (풀 또는 연못을 형성하는 작동 유체에서의 것 F24S 10/10)
title.en: Arrangements for storing heat collected by solar heat collectors (in working fluids forming pools or ponds F24S0010100000)
using latent heat
using chemical reactions, e.g. thermochemical reactions or isomerisation reactions
storing heat in liquids

title.ko: 흡수 요소의 세부
title.en: Details of absorbing elements

title.ko: 흡수 물질에 특징이 있는 것 (흡수성을 증가시키기위한 코팅 또는 표면 처리 F24S 70/20)
title.en: characterised by the absorbing material (absorbing coatings or surface treatment for increasing absorption F24S0070200000)
made of metallic material
made of plastics
made of ceramic; made of concrete; made of natural stone
characterised by absorbing coatings; characterised by surface treatment for increasing absorption
for spectrally selective absorption
Coatings made of metallic material
Coatings made of plastics
Auxiliary coatings, e.g. anti-reflective coatings

title.ko: 구조(structure or construction)에 특징이 있는 것 (흡수를 증가시키기 위한 코팅 또는 표면 처리 F24S 70/20; 보조 코팅 F24S 70/30)
title.en: characterised by the structure or construction (absorbing coatings or surface treatment for increasing absorption F24S0070200000;auxiliary coatings F24S0070300000)
Combinations of  two or more absorbing elements

title.ko: 그룹 F24S 10/00-F24S 70/00에 포함되지 않는 태양열 집열기의 세부, 부속품(accessories) 또는 구성요소(component parts)
title.en: Details, accessories or component parts of solar heat collectors  not provided for in groups F24S0010000000-F24S0070000000
Materials for heat-exchange conduits
Working fluids specially adapted for solar heat collectors
Arrangements for connecting the fluid circuits of solar heat collectors with each other or with other components, e.g. pipe connections; Fluid distributing means, e.g. headers
Casings
characterised by the material
made of metallic material
made of plastics

title.ko: 투명한 커버; 들어오는 태양 광선을 전송하고 나가는 열 방사선을 차단하기위한 요소
title.en: Transparent coverings; Elements for transmitting incoming solar rays and preventing outgoing heat radiation

title.ko: 재료에 특징이 있는 것 (열 손실 방지를 위한 것 F24S 80/56) ]
title.en: characterised by the material  (for preventing heat loss F24S0080560000)
made of plastics
using evacuated elements
characterised by means for preventing heat loss
characterised by their mountings or fixing means

title.ko: 단열 (투명 커버링 F24S 80/50)
title.en: Thermal insulation (transparent coverings F24S0080500000)
characterised by the material
Sealing means
Solar heat systems not otherwise provided for
using thermosiphonic circulation
